description: IF with compound AND/OR: A > 1 AND B < 10 OR C = 99. AND binds tighter.
notes: COBOL AND has higher precedence than OR: (A > 1 AND B < 10) OR (C = 99). A=5 > 1 is true, B=3 < 10 is true, so first AND clause is true. C=0 != 99 but doesn't matter. Result='TRUE'. Engine should preserve precedence in generated Python.
